---
title: "Supplementary Materials"
toc: true
toc-title: "Indice"

---

<br>

## Meta-analisi

<a href="supplementary/book_Borenstein_2009.pdf" download="book_Borenstein_2009.pdf" class="btn btn-primary">
  Libro sulle Meta-Analisi - Borenstein, 2009 (pdf)
</a>

<a href="supplementary/borenstein_paper_2023.pdf" download="borenstein_paper_2023.pdf" class="btn btn-primary">
  Heterogeneity in meta-analysis - Borenstein, 2023 (pdf)
</a>


<br>


## Meta-analisi Bayesiane - Articoli

<a href="supplementary/Lionetti_et_al_2015a.pdf" download="Lionetti_et_al_2015a.pdf" class="btn btn-primary">
  Attachment in institutionalized children - Lionetti et al., 2015 (pdf)
</a>

<a href="supplementary/Lionetti_et_al_2019.pdf" download="Lionetti_et_al_2019.pdf" class="btn btn-primary">
  Sensory Processing Sensitivity & personality traits - Lionetti et al., 2019 (pdf)
</a>

<a href="supplementary/DeLuca_et_al_2023.pdf" download="DeLuca_et_al_2023.pdf" class="btn btn-primary">
  Non-Suicidal Self-Injury during adolescence - De Luca et al., 2023 (pdf)
</a>


<br>


## RStudio

<a href="supplementary/introduction2r.pdf" download="introduction2r.pdf" class="btn btn-primary">
  Manuale introduttivo a RStudio - Callegher & Gambarota (pdf)
</a>

<br>

## Multiverse Meta-Analysis

[Slides](supplementary/csa_2026_slides.html)
